steps.title: Use the standard-feature clue
steps.content: The passage says certain features are almost always included in mosque designs. A minaret is presented as one of those standard elements, so the blank needs a word for a defining or signature feature of mosque architecture.

steps.title: Reject mismatched nouns
steps.content: Choice B means refusal. Choice C means a reason for action. Choice D means an exact copy. The needed word names a distinguishing characteristic that marks a design as belonging to a style. The answer is A.
